prompt: Full body commercial humanoid robot, head to toe in frame, strict front-facing neutral standing pose with both arms straight down at sides slightly away from torso, hands elbows shoulders legs and feet visible. Realistic modern consumer android from the SAME product line as a sleek white Tesla-Optimus-style robot but a distinct heavier-duty variant: matte white and light grey shell panels with visible panel seams and a bulkier reinforced chest plate and shoulder pauldrons, dark grey articulated joints at neck shoulders elbows wrists hips knees ankles, exposed segmented actuators and hydraulic pistons and cabling at the joints, a smooth dark visor face screen with a single glowing sensor strip, defined five-finger robotic hands with thicker gripper fingers, sturdy bipedal legs with heavy robotic feet. Clean product studio look, symmetrical, standing upright. No cropping, no A-pose, no bent elbows, no side view, no three-quarter view, no action pose. Simple isolated plain neutral background.
